release_rule: Release only an immutable Git commit SHA or signed archive digest and record the identifier before first challenger access.

required_artifact_groups.selection_rule: all USD-W1 through USD-W6 scope, fixture, candidate, result, proof, audit, checker, test, equivalence, cost, invariance, ablation, minimality, and independence artifacts
all failed controls, boundary cases, rejected transformations, unresolved gates, actual-process limitations, and mutation corpora
all referenced Lean sources, mechanization reports, validators, regression tests, workflow definitions, and assurance artifacts required to audit machine-check claims

completeness_checks: the parent POST-USD-EVC-001 registration artifact is included
all twelve adversarial challenges are included
every challenged conclusion resolves to source evidence
all cost ledgers and commitment-equivalence definitions are included
all failed, negative, boundary, and unresolved results are included
internal robustness and external independence remain distinct
release and first-access state remain false before delivery
nonclaims: an adversarial team has received the package
the bounded result survived adversarial criticism
